items.name: MutagenesisX
items.description: With MutagenesisX you get a bash driven menu system (has TUI and GUI - Zenity Based) that utilizes folders to create the main menu structure and the .sh files inside those folders to create the sub-menu's. As you might expect, MutagenesisX then runs those scripts allowing you creative freedom to focus on the scripts instead of a menu system.
